nasb.text: So he made the pillars, and two rows around on the one network to cover the capitals which were on the top of the pomegranates; and so he did for the other capital.

esv.text: Likewise he made pomegranates in two rows around the one latticework to cover the capital that was on the top of the pillar, and he did the same with the other capital.

cnv.text: 他又做了兩行石榴圍繞在柱頭上，柱頂的網子上，兩個柱頂都是這樣。

ccb.text: 网周围环绕着两行石榴。
